title: Wireless Security & Access Control
subtitle: Protecting enterprise WLANs using authentication, encryption, and policy enforcement.

items.title: WPA2 / WPA3 Security
items.desc: Encrypts wireless traffic between clients and access points to ensure confidentiality and secure communication.
details: WPA3 offers stronger protection than WPA2.
Secures communication between clients and APs.

items.title: 802.1X Authentication
items.desc: Uses RADIUS authentication to verify users and devices before granting WLAN access.

items.title: AAA Integration
items.desc: Integrates with Cisco ISE, RADIUS, or TACACS+ servers for centralized authentication and authorization.
details: Integrates with Cisco ISE and RADIUS.

items.title: Guest Access
items.desc: Provides isolated internet connectivity for visitors without exposing internal enterprise resources.
